fields.description_ar:

تشمل الجلسة:

	•	تحسين الدورة الدموية
	•	تخفيف التوتر والإجهاد
	•	منح شعور بالراحة والاسترخاء

fields.name: JAPANESE HAIR DETOX
fields.description:
A luxurious 6-step scalp and hair detox treatment designed for deep cleansing, nourishment, and relaxation. The session begins with a deep scalp cleanse to remove oil buildup and impurities, followed by scalp purification and stimulation to boost circulation. It includes a nourishing natural oil mask for the scalp and a deep hydration hair mask to restore softness and shine. The experience is completed with a relaxing head and shoulder massage that helps relieve stress, tension, and fatigue while promoting total relaxation and wellness.

Session Includes:
	•	Deep scalp cleansing
	•	Scalp purification & exfoliation
	•	Nourishing natural oil mask
	•	Deep hydration hair mask
	•	Head & shoulder massage
	•	Complete scalp & hair rejuvenation

What You’ll Experience
	•	Deeply cleanses the scalp
	•	Stimulates scalp circulation
	•	Nourishes and hydrates the hair
	•	Helps reduce stress and headaches
	•	Supports healthy hair growth
	•	Provides deep relaxation and comfort

تشمل الجلسة:
	•	تنظيف عميق لفروة الرأس
	•	تقشير وتنقية الفروة
	•	ماسك زيوت طبيعية مغذي
	•	ماسك ترطيب عميق للشعر
	•	مساج للرأس والأكتاف
	•	استرخاء وتجديد كامل لفروة الرأس والشعر

تجربة تمنحكِ

	•	يمنح شعور بالراحة والاسترخاء العميق
